description: Read-only diagnostic configuration for OP Stack / Superchain operators. The config declares endpoint locations and intended topology; opstack-doctor validates live behavior through read-only RPC and metrics checks.

chain_id.description: Expected L2 chain ID. Compared against eth_chainId on execution endpoints.

name.description: Human-readable chain name used in reports and Prometheus labels.

candidate_rpc.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

compare_blocks.description: Number of latest common blocks to compare between reference and candidate execution clients.

max_head_lag_blocks.description: Maximum allowed candidate lag behind reference before a failure finding.

reference_rpc.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

interop.description: Basic dependency-set readiness checks. This schema and v0.x checker do not validate cross-chain messages or full interop protocol correctness.

dependencies.description: Chains in the configured dependency set.

chain_id.description: Expected chain ID for the dependency.

metrics.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

rpc.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

metrics.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

expected_chains.description: Chain IDs expected in op-supervisor refs.

metrics.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

op_nodes.description: Configured op-node fleet members and intended source/light/sequencer topology.

follows.description: Name of the configured source op-node this light or sequencer node is intended to follow.

metrics.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

name.description: Unique node name used in findings and follow-source references.

rpc.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

proxyd.description: Declared proxyd/routing endpoints and expected backend groups. opstack-doctor checks external RPC/metrics behavior, not private proxyd TOML.

consensus_aware.description: Declared operator intent that this proxyd endpoint uses consensus-aware routing.

expected_backends.description: op-node names this proxyd endpoint is expected to route to or front.

metrics.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

name.description: Unique proxyd endpoint name used in findings and alert labels.

rpc.description: HTTP(S) URL. URLs may contain credentials, but opstack-doctor redacts sensitive URL components before rendering findings.

thresholds.description: Operator thresholds used by warning/failure checks and generated alert templates.

max_rpc_latency_seconds.description: Warning threshold for observed op-node/proxyd RPC latency metrics and generated latency alert templates.

max_safe_lag_blocks.description: Warning threshold for follower safe-head or RPC-head lag behind source.

min_peer_count.description: Warning threshold for op-node peer count metrics.

title: opstack-doctor configuration
